Media Partners

TaskChain Ecosystem

Quest2Earn

Accept quests in form of small digital tasks and turn them in for experience points, NFTs and cryptocurrency rewards.

Work2Earn

Work from anywhere, earn rewards from completing Single Jobs or take part in Voted Jobs, where community decides who gets the main reward and draft fees.

Compete2Earn

Most active members of the community will get extra rewards and benefits based on their standing in yearly, monthly and weekly  leaderboards.

How Quest2Earn works

1
Choose the section
2
Explore all available quests
3
Complete all quest
4
Turn in quest

How Quest2Earn Works

Quest2Earn

Enter the Quest2Earn section on the TaskChain platform

Browse through the different sections and pick one to your liking.

Choose your section

Learning

Platform Quests

Shopping

Travelling

Gaming

Trading

Event Quests

Explore all available Quests

Once you decide on Quest category, browse through all available Quests available for you and select one.

Available quests are marked with an exclamation mark (!)

Some sections will include a storyline.

Quest Categories

Learning

Introduction to cryptocurrency

Learn the basics of blockchainn

Discover types of cryptocurrencies

Complete chapter 1 test

Platform Quests

Choose your first avatar

Write your bio

Complete a total of 10 Quests

Shopping

Travelling

Gaming

Trading

Event Quests

Progress the Quests

Read what the Quest will require you to do and what rewards you would be getting. If you like it, accept the Quest.

Choose your first avatar

It’s time to pick a pic that will represent your TaskChain profile!

Do it here ->

10 TASKC
5 Experience
ACCEPT
QUEST

Choose your first avatar (in progress)

It’s time to pick a pic that will represent your TaskChain profile!

Do it here ->

10 TASKC
5 Experience
Abandon
QUEST

Turn in Quest

Completed Quests have a Question mark next to them. That means it’s time to turn it in and grab the rewards!

Choose your first avatar (in progress)

That looks great TaskChainer! You are now ready to begin your Questing journey in style!

Rewards:
10 TASKC
5 Experience
COMPLETE
QUEST

About TaskChain

TaskChain's vision is to establish a virtual space where individuals can easily find a wide range of side income opportunities, collaborate on specific tasks, and receive payment in cryptocurrency. TaskChain integrates into everyday activities and purchases and rewards its users with cryptocurrency for completing specific Quests.

TaskVerse

The concept of TaskChain is metaverse ready. Our ultimate goal is to create a virtual reality/augmented reality features that will enable users to experience earning and employer-worker interaction like never seen before.

Use of NFTs

TaskChain will include it’s own NFT collections with different rarities, which will allow the holders to enhance their earnings and access bonus community features.

Platform Sustainability

TaskChain embraces a partnership approach with external platforms to continually supply new and exciting Quests across various sections, offering our community members a wide range of engaging possibilities.

When a user successfully completes a Quest, half of the affiliate earnings will be allocated to fuel the Quest reward pools. The remaining half will be further divided: 25% will contribute to the Reserve, competition pools, or fueling Quest reward pools, while the other 25% will bolster the platform's profitability.

This innovative model ensures that 75% of all earnings are directed towards community rewards, while the remaining 25% sustains the platform. By striking this balance, TaskChain becomes a truly sustainable ecosystem, empowering users to earn and thrive within the digital economy.

Why $TASKC?

Utilizing blockchain technology TaskChain is supporting global economy by creating an earning platform for individuals or groups. This not only helps to decrease percentage of poverty and unemployment in some regions, but also provides a unique opportunity for people to earn rewards while participating in quests, jobs and competitions. TaskChain is also able to provide a decentralized and secure way of distributing rewards and payrolls via its native token TASKC.

TASKC is the lifeblood of TaskChain ecosystem, bringing the necessary utility for community transactions, use of NFTs and other Web3 elements like metaverse integration in the future.

Copying is successful!

Ethereum

TASKC

Project Roadmap

FAQ

How can I buy $TASKC?

During presale phase, you can buy $TASKC on taskchain.co using USDT, ETH or via credit card through our partner. Ensure you have enough ETH in your wallet to cover GAS fees.

Where can I get in touch with the TaskChain team?

The founder, core team members and moderators are most active on our Discord and Telegram. Feel free to ask us anything about the project there!

What is the main goal of TaskChain?

TaskChain strives to build greatest Work2Earn and Quest2Earn ecosystem with gaming elements and metaverse integration.
